fields.name: Bene
fields.description: Celestial resonance: Give freely, generosity, sacrifice for others.

fields.name: Liberare
fields.description: Celestial resonance: Free others, liberation, breaking chains.

fields.name: Fidelis
fields.description: Celestial resonance: Keep bonds, loyalty, faithfulness.

fields.name: Misera
fields.description: Celestial resonance: Spare enemies, mercy, compassion.

fields.name: Fortis
fields.description: Celestial resonance: Stand firm, courage, resolve.

fields.name: Honoris
fields.description: Celestial resonance: Fair conduct, honor, integrity.

fields.name: Verax
fields.description: Celestial resonance: Seek truth, honesty, transparency.

fields.name: Copperi
fields.description: Celestial resonance: Maintain hope, inspiration, optimism.

fields.name: Praedari
fields.description: Abyssal resonance: Ruthlessly take, predation, acquisition.

fields.name: Dominari
fields.description: Abyssal resonance: Control others, domination, subjugation.

fields.name: Perfidus
fields.description: Abyssal resonance: Betray bonds, treachery, broken oaths.

fields.name: Maligna
fields.description: Abyssal resonance: Harm with malice, cruelty, sadism.

fields.name: Tremora
fields.description: Abyssal resonance: Break through fear, terror, intimidation.

fields.name: Saevus
fields.description: Abyssal resonance: Brutal destruction, savagery, ferocity.

fields.name: Insidia
fields.description: Abyssal resonance: Deceive and manipulate, cunning, treachery.

fields.name: Despari
fields.description: Abyssal resonance: Crush into despair, hopelessness, nihilism.

fields.name: Firma
fields.description: Primal resonance: Lasting, durable, steady, enduring.

fields.name: Vola
fields.description: Primal resonance: Fleeting, swift, illusory, transient.

fields.name: Audax
fields.description: Primal resonance: Reckless, bold, instinctive, daring.

fields.name: Medita
fields.description: Primal resonance: Patient, planned, careful, deliberate.

fields.name: Arderi
fields.description: Primal resonance: Emotionally driven, expressive, passionate.

fields.name: Sereni
fields.description: Primal resonance: Controlled, calm, reserved, tranquil.

fields.name: Fera
fields.description: Primal resonance: Natural, instinctive, feral, wild.

fields.name: Civitas
fields.description: Primal resonance: Trained, civilized, precise, refined.
